meaning: v.(以拖长的单调音)吟咏,吟咏,唱或吟咏(圣歌)
examples: "My vessel has only slight damage on forecastle and bulb," I intone.
Let's intone the fair-sounding carol for the celebration of Christmas Eve.
There won"t have two tigers intone . place, unless they"re ma. le and female.
Therefore, they solemnly intone, we should stop wasting lives and treasure trying to achieve it.
When something goes wrong, managers simply intone: It would be un-Japanese to fire anyone or to close plants.
